document_meta.document_title: ANALOGIC 0-10 VDC INPUT DEVICE FOR BUDERUS SSB BOILERS

source_refs.section_title: Connection to the boiler
source_refs.source_quote: SUPPLY 120VAC / 60Hz, 24 hour dedicated circuit.

source_refs.section_title: Connection to the boiler
source_refs.source_quote: SUPPLY 120VAC / 60Hz, 24 hour dedicated circuit.

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of setpoint
source_refs.source_quote: The setpoint of the boiler is linearly controlled into the voltage interval of 1VDC to 9VDC from a minimum value equal to Par. 23 to a maximum value equal to Par. 24.

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of Modulation Rate
source_refs.source_quote: The power of the boiler is linearly controlled into the voltage interval of 1VDC to 9VDC from a minimum value defined by the Par. 93 to a maximum value defined by the Par. 92.

source_refs.section_title: Use of the device for a cascade system
source_refs.source_quote: The setpoint of the cascade system is linearly controlled into the voltage interval of 1VDC to 9VDC from a minimum value equal to Par. 23 to a maximum value equal to Par. 24.

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of setpoint
source_refs.source_quote: The boiler starts when the voltage is higher than 1.5VDC and turns off when the voltage is lower than 1VDC.

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of Modulation Rate
source_refs.source_quote: The boiler starts when the voltage is higher than 1.5VDC and turns off when the voltage is lower than 1VDC.

source_refs.section_title: Use of the device for a cascade system
source_refs.source_quote: The cascade starts when the voltage is higher than 1.5VDC and turns off when the voltage is lower than 1VDC.

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of setpoint
source_refs.source_quote: The boiler starts when the voltage is higher than 1.5VDC and turns off when the voltage is lower than 1VDC.

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of Modulation Rate
source_refs.source_quote: The boiler starts when the voltage is higher than 1.5VDC and turns off when the voltage is lower than 1VDC.

source_refs.section_title: Use of the device for a cascade system
source_refs.source_quote: The cascade starts when the voltage is higher than 1.5VDC and turns off when the voltage is lower than 1VDC.

technical_specs.parameter: Analog Input Voltage for Maximum Setpoint/Power

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of setpoint
source_refs.source_quote: For a voltage between 9VDC and 10VDC the setpoint is in any case set to the maximum value.

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of Modulation Rate
source_refs.source_quote: For a voltage between 9VDC and 10VDC the power is in any case set to the maximum value.

source_refs.section_title: Use of the device for a cascade system
source_refs.source_quote: For a voltage between 9VDC and 10VDC the setpoint is in any case set to the maximum value.

technical_specs.parameter: Boiler Parameter N. 1 (Central Heating (CH) Mode) for Setpoint Control

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of setpoint
source_refs.source_quote: N. 1 Description Central Heating (CH) Mode Comment This parameter must be set to 4

source_refs.section_title: Use of the device for a cascade system
source_refs.source_quote: N. 1 Description Central Heating (CH) Mode Comment This parameter must be set to 4

technical_specs.parameter: Boiler Parameter N. 23 (Design Supply Min Limit)

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of setpoint
source_refs.source_quote: N. 23 Description Design Supply Min Limit Comment Min setpoint temperature

source_refs.section_title: Use of the device for a cascade system
source_refs.source_quote: N. 23 Description Design Supply Min Limit Comment Min setpoint temperature

technical_specs.parameter: Boiler Parameter N. 24 (Design Supply Max Limit) for Setpoint Control

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of setpoint
source_refs.source_quote: N. 24 Description Design Supply Max Limit Comment Max setpoint temperature

source_refs.section_title: Use of the device for a cascade system
source_refs.source_quote: N. 24 Description Design Supply Max Limit Comment Max setpoint temperature

technical_specs.parameter: Boiler Parameter N. 1 (Central Heating (CH) Mode) for Modulation Rate Control

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of Modulation Rate
source_refs.source_quote: N. 1 Description Central Heating (CH) Mode Comment This parameter must be set to 5

technical_specs.parameter: Boiler Parameter N. 24 (Design Supply Max Limit) for Modulation Rate Control
technical_specs.value: This parameter sets the setpoint of the boiler

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of Modulation Rate
source_refs.source_quote: N. 24 Description Design Supply Max Limit Comment This parameter sets the setpoint of the boiler

technical_specs.value: This parameter sets the maximum power

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of Modulation Rate
source_refs.source_quote: N. 92 Description Fan Speed Maximum Comment This parameter sets the maximum power

technical_specs.value: This parameter sets the minimum power

source_refs.section_title: Central Heating with Analog Input Control of Modulation Rate
source_refs.source_quote: N. 93 Description Fan Speed Minimum Comment This parameter sets the minimum power

safety_warnings.topic: Practices not related to personal injury
safety_warnings.text: NOTICE is used to address practices not related to personal injury.

safety_warnings.text: This control may be mounted remotely from the boiler. Please make sure this control is not subjected to high heat, excessive moisture, or dust. All wiring shall be accomplished by a licensed electrician according to Federal, State and/or local codes.

source_refs.source_quote: NOTICE: This control may be mounted remotely from the boiler. Please make sure this control is not subjected to high heat, excessive moisture, or dust. All wiring shall be accomplished by a licensed electrician according to Federal, State and/or local codes.

extraction_notes: Some technical specifications for boiler parameters (N. 23, 24, 92, 93) describe the parameter's function rather than providing a specific numerical value, hence 'review_required' is set to true for these entries.
No fault codes, diagnostic codes, or status codes were extracted. Manual should be reviewed or reprocessed.
